description: YAMTAM ENGINE — background audit hook. Runs yamtam audit after git push and git commit, rewakes Claude with findings if any risks are detected.

hooks.rewakeMessage: Background YAMTAM audit of committed changes — review findings below and address or acknowledge before continuing:
hooks.rewakeSummary: YAMTAM audit found security/risk issues in committed files

hooks.rewakeMessage: Background YAMTAM audit of pushed commits — review findings below and address or acknowledge before continuing:
hooks.rewakeSummary: YAMTAM audit found security/risk issues in pushed commits
